languages.text: "Наведаемся к месту, где Себериан хранит меч. Я отвлеку охрану, остальное — за тобой. Пошли".

traits.locale_text: "Наведаемся к месту, где Себериан хранит меч. Я отвлеку охрану, остальное — за тобой. Пошли".

languages.text: "We shall go to the place where Seberian keeps his sword. I'll distract the guards, the rest is up to you. Come along."
languages.original_text: "Наведаемся к месту, где Себериан хранит меч. Я отвлеку охрану, остальное — за тобой. Пошли".

traits.locale_text: "We shall go to the place where Seberian keeps his sword. I'll distract the guards, the rest is up to you. Come along."
"We shall go to the place where Seberian keeps his sword. I'll distract the guards, the rest is up to you. Come along."
"We shall go to the place where Seberian keeps his sword. I'll distract the guards, the rest is up to you. Come along."

languages.text: “我们去塞贝里安存放那把宝剑的地方。我来引开守卫，剩下的就看你了。跟我来。”
languages.original_text: "We shall go to the place where Seberian keeps his sword. I'll distract the guards, the rest is up to you. Come along."

traits.locale_text: “我们去塞贝里安存放那把宝剑的地方。我来引开守卫，剩下的就看你了。跟我来。”

languages.text: « Nous allons nous rendre là où Seberian fait garder son épée. Je ferai diversion et vous devrez vous charger du reste. Venez avec moi. »
languages.original_text: "We shall go to the place where Seberian keeps his sword. I'll distract the guards, the rest is up to you. Come along."

traits.locale_text: « Nous allons nous rendre là où Seberian fait garder son épée. Je ferai diversion et vous devrez vous charger du reste. Venez avec moi. »

languages.text: "Seberian'ın kılıcını sakladığı yere gideceğiz. Muhafızları oyalayacağım, gerisi sana kalmış. Gel benimle."
languages.original_text: "We shall go to the place where Seberian keeps his sword. I'll distract the guards, the rest is up to you. Come along."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian'ın kılıcını sakladığı yere gideceğiz. Muhafızları oyalayacağım, gerisi sana kalmış. Gel benimle."

languages.text: «Iremos al lugar donde Seberian guarda su espada. Yo distraeré a los guardias; el resto depende de usted. Venga conmigo».
languages.original_text: "We shall go to the place where Seberian keeps his sword. I'll distract the guards, the rest is up to you. Come along."

traits.locale_text: «Iremos al lugar donde Seberian guarda su espada. Yo distraeré a los guardias; el resto depende de usted. Venga conmigo».

languages.text: "Wir sollten den Ort aufsuchen, an dem Seberian sein Schwert aufbewahrt. Ich werde die Wachen ablenken, den Rest erledigt Ihr. Kommt mit."
languages.original_text: "We shall go to the place where Seberian keeps his sword. I'll distract the guards, the rest is up to you. Come along."

traits.locale_text: "Wir sollten den Ort aufsuchen, an dem Seberian sein Schwert aufbewahrt. Ich werde die Wachen ablenken, den Rest erledigt Ihr. Kommt mit."

languages.text: 「シベリアが剣を保管している場所へ行く。私は警備隊を翻弄する。あとは君次第だ。ついて来い。」
languages.original_text: "We shall go to the place where Seberian keeps his sword. I'll distract the guards, the rest is up to you. Come along."

traits.locale_text: 「シベリアが剣を保管している場所へ行く。私は警備隊を翻弄する。あとは君次第だ。ついて来い。」
